description: Create a two-column content slide on expected price increases outpacing incomes, with a left-side question prompt and a right-side horizontal multi-series bar chart ranking countries by likely vs unlikely responses plus change vs 2023.

header.headline: Prices in my country will increase faster than people’s incomes
header.sub: For each of the following, please tell me how likely or unlikely you think they are to happen...?

left.body:
For each of the following, please tell me how likely or unlikely you think they are to happen...?

Prices in my country will increase faster than people’s incomes

footer.source: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024. © Ipsos Predictions 2025 Report
